scripts.build: bun run build-components && bun run build-templates
scripts.build-templates: mkdir -p dist/templates && mjml src/templates/*.mjml -o dist/templates/ --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath '["../_styles","../blocks","../components"]'
scripts.build-components: mkdir -p dist/components && mjml src/components/*.mjml -o dist/components/ --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath '["../_styles","../blocks"]'
scripts.build-watch: bun run build-components-watch && bun run build-templates-watch
scripts.build-templates-watch: mkdir -p dist/templates && mjml -w src/templates/*.mjml -o dist/templates/ --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath '["../_styles","../blocks","../components"]'
scripts.build-components-watch: mkdir -p dist/components && mjml -w src/components/*.mjml -o dist/components/ --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath '["../_styles","../blocks"]'
scripts.build-minify: bun run build-components-minify && bun run build-templates-minify
scripts.build-templates-minify: mkdir -p dist/templates && mjml src/templates/*.mjml -o dist/templates/ --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath '["../_styles","../blocks","../components"]' --config.minify true
scripts.build-components-minify: mkdir -p dist/components && mjml src/components/*.mjml -o dist/components/ --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath '["../_styles","../blocks"]' --config.minify true
